summary: Compliance Checklist and Lender Autocomplete features fully tested and verified. All backend API tests (9/9) passed. Frontend tests for Compliance tab and Lender Autocomplete all passed. Both new features are working as expected.
seed_data_creation: Test cases created during backend testing were cleaned up. Existing data: Test Client with 2 mortgage cases (purchase=12/12 compliance items completed, product_transfer), TEST_Compliance Client created by previous tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compliance Checklist and Lender Autocomplete features fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) GET /api/cases/{id}/compliance auto-populates checklist based on case type (purchase=12, product_transfer=8, life_insurance=8, home_insurance=3), 2) PUT /api/cases/{id}/compliance updates checklist and persists to DB, 3) CaseDetail page has Compliance tab (data-testid='tab-compliance') with checkboxes, progress bar, green highlight on 100%, 4) LenderAutocomplete component shows dropdown suggestions from ~105 UK lenders, works in both Cases new case form and CaseDetail edit mode

backend_tests.test_2_purchase_case_compliance: PASS - GET /api/cases/{id}/compliance returns 12 items for purchase case
backend_tests.test_3_product_transfer_compliance: PASS - Product transfer case gets 8 checklist items
backend_tests.test_4_life_insurance_compliance: PASS - Life insurance case gets 8 checklist items
backend_tests.test_5_home_insurance_compliance: PASS - Home insurance case gets 3 checklist items
backend_tests.test_6_toggle_compliance_item: PASS - PUT /api/cases/{id}/compliance toggles item and persists verified with GET
backend_tests.test_7_compliance_case_types: PASS - All case type item counts verified
backend_tests.test_8_existing_cases: PASS - Existing purchase case compliance accessible

frontend_tests.test_compliance_tab_exists: PASS - Compliance tab found with data-testid='tab-compliance'
frontend_tests.test_compliance_items_render: PASS - 12 compliance items rendered for purchase case with data-testid='compliance-item-X'
frontend_tests.test_progress_indicator: PASS - Progress indicator shows 'X/12 completed' format
frontend_tests.test_progress_bar: PASS - Progress bar element found and updates correctly
frontend_tests.test_checkbox_toggle: PASS - Checkbox state toggles from unchecked to checked on click
frontend_tests.test_green_highlight_100: PASS - Green highlight banner shows when 100% complete (data-testid='compliance-complete-banner')
frontend_tests.test_lender_autocomplete_new_case: PASS - Typing 'Hal' shows 'Halifax' in dropdown, selecting populates field
frontend_tests.test_lender_autocomplete_edit_mode: PASS - Autocomplete works in CaseDetail edit mode, 'Barclays Bank' suggestion appears
frontend_tests.test_manual_lender_entry: PASS - Custom/non-listed lender can be entered manually
